body:
# Bestiário
```button
name NOVO: Monstro 👹
type command
action QuickAdd: NOVO: Monstro
```
^button-criar-novo-monstro
---
```dataview
TABLE WITHOUT ID
  Tier as "Tier",
  link(file.link, title) AS "Nome",
  Raça AS "Raça",
  Classe as "Classe",
  Sintonia as "Sintonia"
FROM "Sistema/Criaturas/Bestiário"
WHERE subcategoria = "Monstro" and file.name != this.file.name
SORT Raça, Tier DESC
```
